## Background

Describe the problem context and why this change is needed.

## Changes in this PR

Summarize what was changed in this pull request.

## Risk points

List known risks, side effects, or rollout concerns.

## Semantic impact check

Does this change affect any of the following?

- [ ] Schema/contract behavior
- [ ] Provider behavior/integration
- [ ] Workflow semantics
- [ ] UI semantics

If yes, explain briefly.

## UI evidence (optional)

If UI behavior/semantics changed, include screenshots or a short recording.

## Testing

Describe the tests/checks you ran and their results.
